nasRoot.label: NAS Root Path
nasRoot.help: Path to the NAS mount containing the chatroom directory

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: This agent's registered ID in the chatroom (e.g. art, audio, gamedev, uiux, firstclaw)

role.label: Agent Role
role.help: Set to 'orchestrator' for FirstClaw only. All other agents must be 'worker'. Workers can only receive tasks via DM and cannot interact in #general.

localDir.label: Local Queue Directory
localDir.help: Local directory for the daemon's pending message queue

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.help: How often the daemon polls the NAS inbox

repoRoot.label: FirstClaw Repo Root
repoRoot.help: Absolute path to the local FirstClaw git repository. Required for /system-update to work.

chatroomServerUrl.label: Chatroom Server URL
chatroomServerUrl.help: URL of the Chatroom web server. Used for other API calls.

ragServiceUrl.label: RAG Service URL
ragServiceUrl.help: URL of the rag_graphrag service. Overridden by RAG_SERVICE_URL env var. Defaults to http://localhost:8000.
